phases.name: No Touch Live
phases.objective: Freeze production behavior and preserve rollback while measuring the current system.
risks: treating shadow success as live readiness
phases.advance_decision: Advance only if baseline is reproducible and safe gates are confirmed.

phases.name: Prompt Diet
phases.objective: Reduce the prompt master to behavior contract only.
tests_needed: no prompt constants for prices/down payments/docs
risks: removing behavior before tools own facts
acceptance_criteria: commercial facts removed from prompt authority
every removed rule has deterministic owner
phases.advance_decision: Advance only after tool contract coverage exists.

phases.name: Mandatory Tools
phases.objective: Make deterministic tools mandatory for catalog, credit plan, requirements and quote facts.
acceptance_criteria: six mandatory tools have stable contracts
outputs include evidence and tenant metadata
no prompt calculation of commercial facts
phases.advance_decision: Advance only when contract tests pass.

phases.name: State Contract
phases.objective: Make StateWriter the only accepted owner of business fields.
risks: quote state remains valid after changes
phases.advance_decision: Advance only when unsafe writes fail closed.

phases.name: Workflow Contract
phases.objective: Make workflow triggers deterministic, structured and idempotent.
tests_needed: critical triggers cannot use keyword-only contains
phases.advance_decision: Advance only after workflow contract tests pass.

phases.name: Human Quality Eval
phases.objective: Measure Francisco sales quality while obeying deterministic evidence.
risks: correctness improves while sales quality drops
phases.advance_decision: Advance only if correctness and human quality both pass.

phases.name: Single-Contact Live Smoke
phases.objective: Validate one approved contact safely before broader canary.
risks: one-contact smoke mistaken for broad readiness
phases.advance_decision: Advance only with explicit go decision and rollback ready.

phases.name: Real Canary
phases.objective: Expand to controlled real traffic after smoke and replay pass.
risks: tenant-specific assumptions leak into generic runtime
canary grows before evidence supports it
phases.advance_decision: Advance only after measured canary parity and tenant isolation checks.

top_10_breaches: Unified mandatory tool contracts do not yet govern every path.
Plan/down payment specs are globally hardcoded in core.
FAQ overlaps with requirements and commercial rules.
Quote snapshot authority is not universal in live path.
Field aliases are mixed between legacy and target names.
Business workflow trigger names are not fully standardized.
Critical workflows can still be configured around keyword-like conditions.
Document checker contract is not yet a single runtime authority.
Runtime v2 is still shadow/partial rather than the sole live authority.
